g.text: Stoch RSI K curl ↑ through 20, K > D
K crosses up from below 20 · strongest when K was at 0–10
Smoothed Heikin Ashi close > open · bullish bias confirmed
Price ABOVE ZLSMA-50 ★ NEVER trade below
Small float = explosive moves when volume hits
K Smooth: 3 D Smooth: 3 Source: Close
EMA(10) applied to Heikin Ashi candles
Zero Lag SMA — reduces lag vs regular MA
★ Ideal entry: K crosses 20 from 0–10 range
Hard stop · set IMMEDIATELY after fill · no exceptions
Trim ⅓ position · move stop to breakeven
Trail final ⅓ at 10% · let it run
• Stoch RSI K crosses back below 20
Chase: <3% OK · 3–8% caution · >8% wait for re-entry

svg.text: positivitysparkles/tradingbaby · The stop loss IS the trade · Never hold below ZLSMA · 90% watching, 10% clicking
